title: Bucharea atlantica
taxonomy: Bucharea atlantica is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This plant is a type of orchid, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. The genus Bucharea is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the Orchidoideae subfamily, Bucharea atlantica is further grouped with other terrestrial orchids. The classification of Bucharea atlantica is still subject to research and verification in the field of botany.
uses: Bucharea atlantica is a plant species native to the Atlantic coast of North America, and its medicinal uses are not well-documented.
